src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Refactor SecurityFilterChain configuration to use the new Spring Security 6.x / Spring Authorization Server 1.x DSL, replacing deprecated configurers and manual matchers.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Replaced `OAuth2AuthorizationServerConfigurer` and `securityMatcher` with `.oauth2AuthorizationServer()` and `.securityMatcher("/oauth2/**")`, and updated exception handling to use `LoginUrlAuthenticationEntryPoint`.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Remove custom OidcUserInfo mapper logic that relied on deprecated or removed internal APIs in the newer Spring Authorization Server version.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Deleted the `userInfoMapper` function and associated `OidcUserInfoAuthenticationContext` imports, replacing the OIDC configuration with `oidc(Customizer.withDefaults())`.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Introduce a custom RegisteredClientRepository implementation to support database-backed client registration with caching.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Added `@Bean` for `RegisteredClientRepository` returning `new RegisteredClientRepositoryImpl(oauthClientRepository, cacheManager)`.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Add a ClientRegistrationRepository bean to support OAuth2 client registration functionality.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Added `@Bean` for `ClientRegistrationRepository` returning `new JdbcClientRegistrationRepository(oauthClientRepository)`.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Update imports to reflect the new package structure and API changes in Spring Security 6.x.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Replaced imports like `OAuth2AuthorizationServerConfigurer` with `OAuth2AuthorizationServerConfiguration` and added `MediaTypeRequestMatcher` and `LoginUrlAuthenticationEntryPoint`.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace manual SimpleCacheManager with Spring's CaffeineCacheManager for cleaner configuration and better integration.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Switched from new SimpleCacheManager() with manual ArrayList<CaffeineCache> to new CaffeineCacheManager() with registerCustomCache().

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Explicitly disallow null values in the cache to prevent potential runtime issues or unexpected behavior.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Added cacheManager.setAllowNullValues(false);

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Add logic to handle cache entries with zero or negative TTL by omitting expiration settings.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Added if (cachesEnum.getTtl() <= 0) check to conditionally apply expireAfterWrite.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Update indentation and import ordering to match modern code style standards.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Changed indentation from tabs to spaces and reordered imports.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Refactor Spring Security configuration to use the lambda DSL and modern API methods introduced in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3), replacing deprecated fluent methods like `.and()` and setter-style configurers.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Replaced `.authorizeHttpRequests().requestMatchers()...and().csrf().disable()` with `.authorizeHttpRequests(registry -> ...).csrf(AbstractHttpConfigurer::disable)` and added `.securityMatcher()`.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Add explicit OAuth2 Login configuration to the security filter chain, likely to support or fix OAuth2 login flows in the updated Spring Security version.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Added `.oauth2Login(oauth2Login -> oauth2Login.loginPage("/signIn").successHandler(authenticationSuccessHandler()))` to the HttpSecurity builder.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Remove the custom AuthenticationProvider bean which is no longer used or required in the new security configuration structure.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Deleted the `authenticationProvider()` bean method and its associated `AuthenticationProvider` import.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Remove the explicit injection and usage of `AuthenticationDetailsSource` in favor of default behavior or a custom success handler, simplifying the form login configuration.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Removed `authenticationDetailsSource` field and its usage in `.formLogin()`, replacing it with a custom `authenticationSuccessHandler()` bean.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Explicitly define the order of the security filter chain to ensure correct precedence when multiple security configurations exist.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Added `@Order(2)` annotation to the `defaultSecurityFilterChain` bean method.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate from a custom, manual captcha generation and verification logic to the 'tianai-captcha' library.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Replaced imports of `VerificationCodeUtil` and `CaptchaService` with `cloud.tianai.captcha` classes; rewrote controller methods to use `ImageCaptchaApplication` for generating and matching captchas.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Implement `InitializingBean` to configure the new captcha library instance during bean initialization.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Added `implements InitializingBean` and `afterPropertiesSet` method to build `ImageCaptchaApplication` using `TACBuilder`.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Simplify and standardize the captcha API endpoints to align with the new library's requirements.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Removed `/captcha/graph`, `/captcha/sms`, and `/captcha/graph/print` endpoints; added `/captcha/gen` and `/captcha/check` endpoints.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Simplify pagination logic by replacing DataTables-specific parameters (draw, start, length) with standard offset/limit parameters.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Changed @RequestParam from 'draw', 'start', 'length' to 'offset', 'limit' and updated calculation to `offset / limit + 1`.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Add support for the 'clientAuthenticationMethods' field in OAuth2 client management.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Added @RequestParam for 'clientAuthenticationMethods' and logic to set it on the OauthClient object during create and update operations.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Ensure the response status is explicitly set to SUCCESS after successful create or update operations.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Added `responseResult.setStatus(GlobalConstant.SUCCESS)` after `oauthClientService.updateById` and `oauthClientService.create`.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Correct the validation check for required fields during client creation to exclude optional fields like authorities.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Removed 'authorities' from the `StringUtils.isAnyEmpty` check in the else block, as it is likely optional or handled differently.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Explicitly set ID to null when creating a new client to ensure it is treated as a new entity.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Added `object.setId(null)` before setting other properties in the create branch.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace wildcard import with explicit imports for Spring Web annotations to improve code clarity.
Standardize pagination parameters from DataTables-specific names (draw, start, length) to generic names (offset, limit) and remove draw manipulation logic.
Add support for managing user roles by parsing a comma-separated string of role names and attaching them to the user account.
Enable user creation via the existing update endpoint by handling the case where id is 0, including password encoding and role assignment.
Allow updating the username field during user modification operations.
